description:
Cross-platform desktop application for translation based on ChatGPT API.


Improvements and fixes for the reading experience
- Reading highlight now stays in sync with the voice: Edge TTS uses the
  service's exact per-word timings, and local TTS timing accounts for
  leading/trailing silence
- Word definition hover cards now work inside example sentences, and the
  hover card and word highlight have a cleaner, more refined look
- Numbered example sentences without punctuation after the number are
  now recognized as readable
- Reading, hover, and input-box highlights share one accent color
  palette with smooth transitions
- Fixed the loading spinner wobbling around an off-center origin
- Fixed the language swap icon vertical alignment
- Redesigned the footer update pill
This release also includes the word definition hover cards (#1899),
which were previously only on main and never shipped in a release.
